title: Cherry Blossom(Sakura) Tools
description: This resourcepack replaces all netherite tools with Cherry Blossom ones
body:
This resourcepack replaces all netherite tools with Cherry Blossom ones

 

In some day i decided what if i create this resourcepack ? And i did it, it looks really cute, and cool, i love that, and tools btw looks really awesome as well

 

Here is the tools :3
![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf50a93e79cf5d130134f5675d6bf58d3a5856e.png)
As you can see most of them has a cherry flower on binding, it looks really cool

There is how a Sword looks in hand
It's has a green leaves,sakura petals and a handle of sakura log

![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d193ad6da0daf5cc10980156c34e043a6620b61.png)

There how it is looks in inventory, i love that pink name

(The dark ui are not included in resource pack it is a [vanilla tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) thing)

![Inventory screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/913a911fe38ca49559b30fc992da40a9aaeed809.png)
I hope you enjoing resource pack, have a good day
